ast.name: log
ast.source: TODOseq: First install flag reset. Reload plugin to test first-install behavior.
ast.target: TODOseq：首次安装标志已重置。请重新加载插件以测试首次安装行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keyword or text to set on the source task after migrating to daily note. Leave empty to disable.
ast.target: 迁移至每日笔记后，要在源任务上设置的关键词或文本。留空则禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define how states transition. Each line: STATE -> next_state. Use (a | b) to define multiple initial states.
ast.target: 定义状态转换方式。每行格式：状态 -> 下一状态。使用 (a | b) 定义多个初始状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default state for inactive tasks when no explicit transition is defined.
ast.target: 当未明确定义转换时，非活动任务的默认状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default state for active tasks when no explicit transition is defined.
ast.target: 当未明确定义转换时，活动任务的默认状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default state for completed tasks when no explicit transition is defined.
ast.target: 当未明确定义转换时，已完成任务的默认状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add closed: timestamp when tasks are marked as completed.
ast.target: 任务标记为已完成时，添加 closed: 时间戳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, include tasks inside quote and callout blocks (>, >[!info], >[!todo], etc.).
ast.target: 启用后，将包含引用块和标注块（>、>[!info]、>[!todo] 等）内的任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, include tasks inside comments (%%).
ast.target: 启用后，将包含注释（%%）内的任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, tasks inside fenced code blocks (``` or ~~~) will be included.
ast.target: 启用后，将包含围栏代码块（``` 或 ~~~）内的任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, tasks inside code blocks will be detected using language-specific comment patterns e.g. `// TODO`
ast.target: 启用后，将使用语言特定的注释模式（例如 `// TODO`）检测代码块内的任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which day the week starts on for date filtering.
ast.target: 选择日期筛选中每周的起始日。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how completed items are shown in the task list.
ast.target: 选择已完成项目在任务列表中的显示方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how tasks with future dates are displayed in the task list.
ast.target: 选择未来日期的任务在任务列表中的显示方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the default sort method for the task list.
ast.target: 选择任务列表的默认排序方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically convert natural language dates like "today", "tomorrow", "due next week".
ast.target: 自动转换自然语言日期，如“今天”、“明天”、“下周到期”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove natural language text (e.g., "today", "tomorrow") after conversion to structured dates.
ast.target: 转换为结构化日期后，移除自然语言文本（例如“今天”、“明天”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Highlight task keywords (todo, doing, etc.) in bold with accent color in the editor.
ast.target: 在编辑器中，使用强调色加粗高亮显示任务关键词（todo、doing 等）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Experimental features may be changed significantly or removed entirely in future versions.
ast.target: 实验性功能在未来版本中可能会发生重大更改或被完全移除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, scans for .org files in vault and detects tasks using org-mode syntax.
ast.target: 启用后，扫描保险库中的 .org 文件，并使用 org-mode 语法检测任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, scans code files (.js, .ts, .py, .rb, .java, .rs, .go, .c, .cpp, .cs, .swift, .kt, .sh, .YAML, .yml, .toml, .SQL, .ini, .r, .dockerfile, .ps1) for todo-style comments and detects them as tasks. Supports multi-line comments and skips keywords inside string literals.
ast.target: 启用后，扫描代码文件（.js、.ts、.py、.rb、.java、.rs、.go、.c、.cpp、.cs、.swift、.kt、.sh、.YAML、.yml、.toml、.SQL、.ini、.r、.dockerfile、.ps1）中的待办风格注释，并将其检测为任务。支持多行注释，并跳过字符串字面量内的关键词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, uses themed checkbox styles ([/], [-]) for active and cancelled tasks.
ast.target: 启用后，为活动和已取消的任务使用主题复选框样式（[/]、[-]）。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include tasks inside quote and callout blocks
ast.target: 包含引用块和标注块内的任务

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 扫描代码文件中的注释

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用扩展 Markdown 复选框样式

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source:
TODO -> DOING -> DONE
(WAIT | WAITING) -> IN-PROGRESS
LATER -> NOW -> DONE
ast.target: TODO -> DOING -> DONE\n(WAIT | WAITING) -> IN-PROGRESS\nLATER -> NOW -> DONE

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Please wait while your tasks are being indexed.
ast.target: 正在为您的任务建立索引，请稍候。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Please wait while your vault is being indexed.
ast.target: 正在为您的保险库建立索引，请稍候。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: You are hiding completed tasks. Switch view mode or add new tasks to see more.
ast.target: 您正在隐藏已完成的任务。切换视图模式或添加新任务以查看更多内容。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Try clearing the search or switching view modes.
ast.target: 请尝试清除搜索条件或切换视图模式。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Create tasks in your notes using "todo your task". They will appear here automatically.
ast.target: 在笔记中使用“todo 你的任务”创建任务。它们将自动显示在此处。
